title: POLARIS Codex Verdict v1
description: Schema for verdicts emitted by Codex CLI on per-task review per Plan v13 §C. Validated by precommit hook AND server-side GitHub Actions verdict-validate job. Schema-equivalence (not byte-equivalence) is the merge gate.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumps require user-signed canonical edit.

task_id.description: Task identifier matching docs/task_acceptance_matrix.yaml task key. snake_case + dots for sub-tasks.

iter.description: Iteration number per Plan v13 §H halt-condition #4 (3 consecutive REQUEST_CHANGES → halt).

codex_session_id.description: Codex CLI session ID from `codex exec` invocation. Resolvable in outputs/audits/codex_audit.jsonl audit log.

model.description: Codex model. Pinned to gpt-5.5 per ~/.codex/config.toml; gpt-5.4 allowed only as documented downgrade with user-signed exception.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort. xhigh required for production verdicts.

canonical_pin_sha.description: SHA256 of docs/canonical_pin.txt at the commit being reviewed. Mismatch with git HEAD = HARD STOP per §A.

commit_sha.description: Full git commit SHA being reviewed.

diff_sha256.description: SHA256 of the staged diff being reviewed (from `git diff --cached`).

verdict_reason.description: Free-text rationale for verdict. Required if verdict != APPROVE.

line.description: Line number in file at commit_sha. 0 if not line-specific.

description.description: Concrete evidence-based description per .codex/codex_red_team_checklist.md anti-pattern rules.

fix_classification.description: Per Plan v13 §C cross-review tag. band_aid = always RED per AUDIT_CYCLE_PROTOCOL_v2.md.

checklist_coverage.description: Which Red-Team Checklist items were applied (per task type).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of verdict generation.

hmac_sha256.description: HMAC-SHA256 over canonical-form serialization of all preceding fields except hmac_sha256 itself, using key in .private/codex_hmac.key. Validated locally by precommit hook AND server-side by verdict-validate job.

manifest_evidence.description: Optional: forensic field for pre-bootstrap-backfill verdicts (Plan v13 §K Step 0d). Lists existing artifact paths that constituted the human-attested evidence-of-completion for tasks completed before the §C gate became operational.

rationale.description: Optional: forensic field for pre-bootstrap-backfill verdicts. Free-text rationale documenting why the task was attested as complete.
